description: '''Chalga''' ({{Langx|bg|чалга}}), often referred to as [[Folk-pop#Balkan region|pop-folk]] or ethno-pop, is a genre of [[Bulgaria]]n pop music. Chalga is a folk-inspired [[dance music]] genre, with a blend of [[Bulgarian folk music|traditional Bulgarian music]] along with influences from [[Music of Greece|Greek]], [[Music of Serbia|Serbian]], [[Music of Turkey|Turkish]], [[Romani music|Romani]] and [[Arabic music|Arabic]] music. It is heavily associated with the Bulgarian [[Romani people in Bulgaria|Romani ethnic minority]]. It is the most popular form of music in Bulgaria.
